title: matricaria maritima var. salina
intro: Matricaria maritima var. salina, also known as Sea Chamomile or Salty Daisy, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family and is native to the coastal areas of Europe and North Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects, helping to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and promote better sleep. The health benefits of Matricaria maritima var. salina include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular natural remedy for various health conditions. Matricaria maritima var. salina can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and health benefits.
